title: rosa canina var. platyphylla
intro: Rosa canina var. platyphylla, also known as the broad-leaved dog rose, is a variety of the dog rose plant, a deciduous shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, and is often used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. platyphylla include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant protection and supporting immune function. Rosa canina var. platyphylla is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in skincare products due to its anti-aging and soothing properties.
